caption: Account Change
description:
Account Change events report when specific user account management tasks are performed, such as a user/role being created, changed, deleted, renamed, disabled, enabled, locked out or unlocked.

When to use this class: Use when the lifecycle or security state of a user account changes — creating, deleting, enabling, disabling, locking, unlocking, password changes, or MFA factor changes. The key differentiator is that the account itself is being modified, not its access rights. Do not use for assigning or revoking privileges on a user (use User Access Management), changing group membership (use Group Management), or managing non-user entities like devices or policies (use Entity Management).
name: account_change

3.caption: Password Change
3.description: An attempt was made to change a user account's password.

4.caption: Password Reset
4.description: An attempt was made to reset a user account's password.

7.caption: Attach Policy
7.description: An IAM Policy was attached to a user/role.

8.caption: Detach Policy
8.description: An IAM Policy was detached from a user/role.

9.caption: Lock
9.description: A user account was locked out.

10.caption: MFA Factor Enable
10.description: One or more authentication factors were enabled for a user account.

11.caption: MFA Factor Disable
11.description: One or more authentication factors were disabled for a user account.

auth_factors.description: Details about the authentication factors associated with the MFA Factor Enable/Disable activities.

policies.description: Details about the IAM policies associated with the Attach/Detach Policy activities.

policy.description: Details about the IAM policy associated to the Attach/Detach Policy activities.

user.description: The user that was a target of an activity.
